passwordHint: Nibura indome 8, harimwo irudome rukuru n'igiharuro
registrationSuccessMessage: Konti yawe yakozwe neza. Raba imeyiri yawe wemeze konti.
passwordMinLength: Ijambo banga ritegerezwa kuba rifise indome 8 nibura
passwordUppercase: Ijambo banga ritegerezwa kuba rifise irudome rukuru
passwordNumber: Ijambo banga ritegerezwa kuba rifise igiharuro

verifyEmail.verifyingDesc: Turiko turagenzura aderesi yawe ya email. Ntibizotwara umwanya munini.
verifyEmail.successDesc2: yaremejwe. Ubu ushobora kwinjira kuri konti yawe.
verifyEmail.errorDesc: Iyo link yo kwemeza siyo canke yararangiye igihe.
verifyEmail.resendHint: Ushobora gusaba ko twohereza indi link yo kwemeza.
verifyEmail.invalidDesc: Iyo link yo kwemeza siyo canke ntiruzuye.
verifyEmail.footerNote: Raba no muri spam nimba utaronse email.

youAcceptOur: Nemera amategeko y'ikoreshwa na uburyo bwo gukoresha amakuru.
youMustAcceptTermsAndConditions: Ugomba kwemera amategeko y'ikoreshwa na uburyo bwo gukoresha amakuru
aboutCopaTitle: Akaryo keza ko guteza imbere abanyamingambi b’Abarundi
aboutCopaDesc1: Ihiganwa ry’imigambi y’ubudandaji (COPA) ni kimwe mu bikorwa vy’umugambi ugamije kugwiza akazi n’ihinduka mu bijanje n’ubutunzi (PRETE), ufashwe mu mugongo y’ibanki y’isi yose. Intumbero yacu ni: kumenya neza, kwigisha no gushigikira amashirahamwe matomato agaragaza ko ari imbere mu migambi gusuvya ayandi mu Burundi.
aboutCopaDesc2: Ihiganwa COPA ryagenewe abantu bose bafise ibikorwa vyo kwiteza imbere, na cane cane ku bakenyezi bafise imigambi yo kwiteza imbere hamwe n’impunzi zipfuza gutanguza igikorwa co kwiyungunganya mu Burundi.
step1Desc: Ugurura ikonte yawe nshasha hanyuma wuzuze umwidondoro wawe nk’umunyamigambi mu minota mikeya.
step2Desc: Kurikirana amakuru yacu atangwa ku buntu kugira mwironkere ubumenyi buhagije ngo mushobore kwitunganiriza umugambi wubudandaji udasanzwe.
step3Desc: Andika kandi wongere urungike umugambi wawe w’ubudandaji imbere yuko ikiringo categekanijwe kirangira. Abahinga bacu bazoca bawusuzuma biciye mu muco ntangere.
step4Desc: Mu gihe mwacaguwe mu bandi, muraronka imfashanyo y’amafaranga ahuye n’umugambi washikirije hamwe n’ugukurikiranwa ku giti cawe kugira umugambi wawe uje mu ngiro.
step5Desc: Mumaze kuronswa intererano yanyu, muzokurikira inyigisho zo gutunganya amashirahamwe yanyu hamwe n’izindi nyigisho zidasanzwe zijanye n’ivyo mukeneye. Vyongeye harategekanijwe imyimenyerezo nkenerwa hamwe n’impanuro z’abahinga kugirango mushikire intumbero y’imigambi y’ishirahamwe ryanyu.
impactDesc: Uko COPA yafashije mw’irangurwa ry’imigambi mu biharuro
testimonial1Label: Uwatsindiye imfashanyo ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial1Text: Kubw’umugambi COPA, narashoboye guhindura urudandazwa rwanje ruto mw’ishirahamwe riteye imbere. Inyigisho zarampaye inguvu zo kubandanya hanyuma intererano y’amafaranga nayo yatumye ngura ibikoresho bigezweho. Kugez’ubu, nkoresha abakozi bagera kuri 5!
testimonial2Label: Uwatsindiye imfashanyo ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial2Text: Mfashijwe na COPA, umushinga wanje wavuye mw'igitekerezo gusa wabaye igicuruzwa giteguruwe neza. Inama nahaye zampaye gushobora gutunganya imari yanje n'inkunga yoroheje kugura ibikoresho vy'ingenzi. Ubu, ndabikorera abakiriya benshi kandi naremye akazi 4!
testimonial3Label: Uwatsindiye imfashanyo ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial3Text: Ubufasha bwa COPA bwamye ihindagurika rikomeye ku bucuruzi bwanje. Urufatiro rwampaye gushobora gutunganya imari yanje n'inkunga yampaye kwongereza ubushobozi bwanje. Ubu, amacuruzi yanje yaragwiyekanye kandi naremye akazi 4 mashasha!
blogTitle1: Imahere anyu arabanje? Gerageza aya majambo 10
blogDesc1: Ico ukoze mugutegura canke mugutwara, intumbero igomba kwibandwa kurufatiro.
blogTitle2: Urimo kwimura ibikorwa vyawe mu yandi mahanga?
blogDesc2: Uwubitsa ibikorwa agomba kwitaho ibibazo birenze uguhitamo gusa!
blogDesc3: Bishobora kuba ivyavuka canke ivy'inyongera, kandi ivyakurikiye birashobora gutangaza...
blogTitle4: Ni gute twakemura amakenga mu bakenge?
blogDesc4: Ico ukoze mugutegura canke mugutwara, intumbero igomba kwibandwa kurufatiro.
copyright: Uwitirirwa igikorwa: © 2026 PRETE – Ntawemerewe kwiyitirira igikorwa | Gifashwe mu mugongo n’ibanki y’isi yose
bannerTitle: COPA - Ihiganwa ry’imigambi yo kwiteza imbere
bannerDescription: Hindura umugambi wawe ube ishirahamwe riteye imbere. COPA nyunganira ifasha amashirahamwe akiri matomato (MPME) hamwe n’ama koperative yo mu Burundi biciye mu nyigisho, gukurikiranwa rimwe ryose hamwe n’intererano biciye mu mahiganwa kugira imigambi yanyu ishigwe mu ngiro.

project.title: Umushinga w'Akazi n'Iterambere ry'Ubukungu
project.description: PRETE ni umugambi wa Reta y’Uburundi, ufashwe mu mugongo n’Ibanki y’isi yose, mu ntumbero yo gufasha abantu kwiteza imbere mu kugwiza ubutunzi atanumwe asigaye inyuma hamwe no kugwiza akazi mu gihugu. Hakoreshejwe amafaranga agera ku miriyoni ijana z’amadorare y’Abanyamerika (100,000,000$USD), uwo mugambi uzomara ikiringo c’imyaka 5 (2024-2028).

list: Guteza imbere ibijanye n’urudandazwa mu Burundi
Gufasha kugira abantu bafise imigambi bipfuza kurangura ngo baronke uko bashigikirwa
Guteza imbere interambere ridakumira mu bijanye n’ubutunzi ku bakenyezi hamwe n’impunzi
Gushigikira ishirwa ry’imitahe mu bintu vyizewe bihuye n’igihe kanaka

list.title: Iterambere ry'ibigo bito
list.desc: Gushigikira ubushobozi bw'ibigo bito n'ibiciriritse mu Burundi biciye mu gice ca 1.2 'Kunoza ubushobozi bw'ibigo' ari naco gitwara gahunda ya COPA.

list.title: Kunoza ibihe vy'ubucuruzi
list.desc: Ivugurura ry'imigenderanire yo kugabanya ingendo, kworoshya kwandikisha ibigo no kurinda abashora imari.

list.title: Ukubona inkunga
list.desc: Guteza imbere uburyo bw'inkunga ku bigo bito n'ibiciriritse, harimwo ingwara ndende n'inkunga itishyurwa.

list.title: Ubwingenzi mu bukungu
list.desc: Gahunda zifise intego yo kwinjiza abakenyezi, urubyiruko n'impunzi mu bukungu bw'Uburundi.

cta.title: Uriteguriye kwinjira muri gahunda ya COPA?
cta.description: Iyandikishe ubu kugira ngo uhabwe ubufasha bukwiye bwo guteza imbere ubucuruzi bwawe.

intro.title: COPA
intro.subtitle: Ihiganwa ry’Imigambi y’ubudandaji
intro.description1: COPA (Ihiganwa ry’Imigambi y’ubudandaji) ni uburyo nyamukuru bw’igice 1.2 ca PRETE. Ni umugambi wuzuye wo gushigikira abanyamigambi b’Abarundi uhuza inyigisho, ubuhanuzi n’imfashanyo.
intro.description2: COPA iha abafise imigambi ifashe akaryo kadasanzwe ko gukarihiriza ubumenyi bwabo no gushikira imfashanyo itasubizwa kugira bashire mu ngiro ivyiyumviro vyabo.

list.title: Inyigisho
list.desc: Gukarisha ubushobozi mu rwiyemezamirimo no mu micungararo biciye mu nyigisho zibereye, zitangwa ku kibanza canke kuri internet.

list.title: Ihiganwa
list.desc: Isuzuma ritomoye kandi ridahengamiye ry’imigambi y’ubudandaji rikozwe n’abahinga bigenga hisunzwe ibipimo bisobanutse.

list.title: Imfashanyo
list.desc: Gutanga imfashanyo y’uguhuza intererano ku batsinze kugira bashire mu ngiro imigambi yabo.

section.title: Ni nde ashobora kwitabira?
section.subtitle: COPA yugururiwe bose
section.description: COPA yugururiwe MPME zose zemewe canke ziri mu nzira yo kwemerwa, ariko hagashirwa imbere cane cane imigwi ikurikira:

list.label: Abakenyezi banyamigambi
list.desc: Amashirahamwe arongowe n’abakenyezi aronka amanota y’inyongera mu isuzuma

list.label: Abanyamigambi b’impunzi
list.desc: Impunzi zanditswe mu Burundi zemerewe kuja muri uwo mugambi

list.label: Urwaruka (18–35)
list.desc: Urwaruka rufise imigambi mishasha kandi ifashe

list.label: Ingaruka nziza ku bidukikije
list.desc: Imigambi ifise ico ifasha ku kirere no ku bidukikije

cta.title: Witeguriye kwitabira Ihiganwa ry’Imigambi y’ubudandaji?
cta.description: Kora konti yawe kandi utangure urugendo rwawe muri COPA kuva uno musi.

hours.title: Amasaha y’akazi
hours.value: Kuva ku wa mbere gushika ku wa gatanu, 8h00-17h00

form.title: Tugume duhanahana amakuru
form.subtitle: Twandikire
form.description: Woba ufise ikibazo kuri COPA? Umugwi wacu uriteguye kugufasha.
form.name: Izina ryawe
form.subject: Icigwa

categories.title: Ivyiciro
list: Gutuma bishobora kuboneka mu mashini zo kurondera

list.title: Kora umurongo wawe bwite w’amakuru ahiganwa

applicationSubmitted.title: Kwemeza ubusabe
applicationSubmitted.notification: Muzoronswa ubutumwa kuri imeyiri no kuri SMS igihe ivyavuye mu gice ca mbere vyasohotse.
applicationSubmitted.confirmation: Turabamenyesha ko twakiriye neza dosiye yanyu y'ubusabe kandi turabashimira ku nyungu mufise kuri COPA Nyunganira.
applicationSubmitted.review: Umugwi ujejwe guhitamwo uzosuzuma dosiye yanyu hanyuma tuzobamenyesha ivyavuye mu gusuzuma.
applicationSubmitted.contact: Nimba mufise ikibazo, twandikire kuri contact@copa-prete.bi canke mutere telefone kuri +257 62 766 766.

sectionTitle.title: Kurikiza izi ntambuko kugira wongere amahirwe yawe
sectionTitle.description: Kwitabira COPA biroroshe! Kurikiza izi ntambuko 7 kugira wongere amahirwe yo gutsinda no gushikira imfashanyo yo guteza imbere ishirahamwe ryawe.

desc.intro: Imbere yo kwiyandikisha, banza usuzume ko ukwije ibisabwa na COPA. Ingingo nyamukuru ni izi:
criteria: Kuba uri MPME yemewe canke iri mu nzira yo kwemerwa mu Burundi
Kuba ufise umugambi w’ishirahamwe ushoboka kandi urimwo udushasha

desc.intro: Kora konti yawe mu minota mike. Uzokenera ibi bikurikira:
criteria: Aderesi ya imeyiri ikora canke inomero ya terefone
Ikarata karangamuntu, urupapuro rw’inzira canke ikarata y’impunzi

steps.title: Uzuza umwidondoro wawe
steps.desc: Umaze kwiyandikisha, uzuza umwidondoro wawe nk’umunyamigambi ushiremwo amakuru yose asabwa: ayo ku muntu, ayo kw’ishirahamwe hamwe n’impapuro zishigikira. Umwidondoro wuzuye wongereza amahirwe yo gutorwa.

steps.title: Kurikirana inyigisho
steps.desc: Kwitabira inyigisho zitegerezwa kubanza gukurikiranwa ku bijanye no gutegura umugambi w’ubudandaji. Inyigisho ni ku buntu kandi zirahari ku kibanza canke kuri internet. Zigufasha kwandika umugambi ukomeye.

steps.title: Andika wongere urungike umugambi wawe
steps.desc: Koresha ibikoresho vyo ku rubuga mu gutegura umugambi wawe w’ubudandaji. Urashobora kubika ivyo wakoze hanyuma ukabisubirako uko ushaka imbere y’igenekerezo rya nyuma.
steps.note: Raba amagenekerezo yo gutanga imigambi mu kirangaminsi ca COPA.

steps.title: Rindira ivyavuye mu gusuzuma
steps.desc: Umugambi wawe uzosuzumwa n’umugwi w’abahinga bigenga hisunzwe ibipimo bitomoye. Uzomenyeshwa ivyavuye mu gusuzuma kuri imeyiri no kuri SMS.
steps.note: Isuzuma rifata nk’iminsi y’akazi iri hagati ya 10 na 15 inyuma y’ugufunga gutanga dosiye.

criteria: Gushira umukono ku masezerano y’imfashanyo na PRETE
Gukurikirana ku giti cawe mu gushira mu ngiro

cta.title: Tanguza urugendo rwawe muri COPA uno musi!
cta.description: Kwiyandikisha ni ku buntu kandi bifata iminota mike gusa.

intro.title: Raba niba ufise uburenganzira bwo kwitabira COPA
intro.description: COPA ifunguriwe MPME zuzuza ibisabwa bikurikira. Raba niba uboneye mbere yo kwiyandikisha.

recevabilityItems: Ikete ry’ugusaba ryatanzwe mu bihe vyateguwe?
Umusaba atanga icemezo c’ukuba i Burundi?
Umusaba yuzuye neza ifishi yo kuri interineti?
Umusaba yatanze inyandiko zari zisabwa muhamagararo ryo gutanga ibitekerezo?
Umusaba ari mw’ibazo c’amahitamwo abiri aravuzwe?
Umusaba yaratsinze mu myigenderanire ya COPA y’imbere?

eligibilityItems.label: Izina ry’Itegeko rya MPME canke Umukoperative
eligibilityItems.desc: Yanditswe mu Bwanditsi bw’Ubucuruzi (RC) canke muri ANACOOP, canke ifise NIF canke ifise icemezo c’ukumenyekana muri komine canki akarere kemeza ko ico kigo gifise umwaka umwe ushize mu buzima ku munsi w’ugusaba ku binyamigambi bitari mu tegeko.

eligibilityItems.label: Imico myiza ya MPME canke Umukoperative n’canke abayobozi bayo
eligibilityItems.desc: Ica kigo n’canke uwuhagarariye mu buryo bw’itegeko ntibagomba kuba barahatiwe kubera ukwiyonkora ku mategeko y’Uburundi.

eligibilityItems.label: Ibice vy’Ikorwa
eligibilityItems.desc: Agri-business, Agro-industrie (urugero Amata, Inkoko, Uburorerwa bw’Amafi, Ivya Musi ndetse n’ibindi bice bifise ubushobozi bunini), ii) Ivya Migodi na iii) serivisi bijanye n’agri-business (harimwo ubukerarugendo n’ikoranabuhanga).

eligibilityItems.label: Ikibanza c’Ufise Umushinga
eligibilityItems.desc: Ufise umushinga ategerezwa kuba ari we uhagarariye mu buryo bw’itegeko rya MPME canke Umukoperative.

eligibilityItems.label: Umupaka w’Ubufasha
eligibilityItems.desc: Ubufasha busabwa bugomba kuba hagati y’amadorari 10 000 n’20 000 y’Amerika.

eligibilityItems.label: Kurondera ibibazo vy’Ahandura n’Umuganda
eligibilityItems.desc: MPME canke Abakoperative ntibategerezwa kuba bari mw’ibazo ry’ukwiyonkora kuri Code y’Ahandura n’Itegeko n°100/22 ryo ku wa 7 Gitugutu 2010 hamwe n’Inyubakwa y’Ahandura n’Umuganda (CGES) y’umushinga PRETE. Ukurondera ahandura n’umuganda bizafasha kumenya neza ibibera muri MPME.

eligibilityItems.label: Kutaba mw’amahitamwo abiri
eligibilityItems.desc: Umusaba ntategerezwa kuba mw’ibazo ry’amahitamwo abiri.

enterprise.title: Ibisabwa ku isosiyete
items: Kuba uri micro, ntoya cyangwa iciriritse ukurikije itegeko ry'igihugu
Kuba wanditswe mu buryo bwemewe mu Burundi CYKA kwiyemeza kwandikwa nihaba waratoranyijwe
Gukora mu rwego rwemewe (raba urutonde ruri munsi)
Kutagira ideni utishura ku Gihugu cyangwa mu bigo by'imari (OBR/INSS/n'ibindi)

promoter.title: Ibisabwa ku washinze isosiyete
items: Kuba uri umunyarwanda CYKA impunzi yanditswe mu Burundi
Kutigeze ubona inkunga ya COPA mu myaka yashize

eligibleList.label: Ubuhinzi n'ibiribwa
eligibleList.desc: Umusaruro, guhindura, kubika no gucuruza ibikomoka ku buhinzi

eligibleList.label: Inganda z'ibikoresho
eligibleList.desc: Guhindura ibikoresho biboneka mu gihugu, gukora ibicuruzwa bifite agaciro

eligibleList.label: Ubucuruzi n'igurishwa
eligibleList.desc: Ubucuruzi buto n'ubunini, igurishwa ry'ibicuruzwa bya buri munsi

eligibleList.label: Ubukorikori n'umukono
eligibleList.desc: Gukora ibikoresho mu maboko, ibihangano, imyenda gakondo n'impu

eligibleList.label: Ikoranabuhanga n'ibiganiro
eligibleList.desc: Gutunganya porogaramu, e-commerce, serivisi za interineti, fintech

eligibleList.label: Ubuzima n'umubiri
eligibleList.desc: Serivisi z'ubuzima zo hafi, amafarama, ibikoresho by'ubuvuzi

eligibleList.label: Uburezi n'amahugurwa
eligibleList.desc: Ibigo by'amahugurwa y'umwuga, amashure y'urubyiruko, gufasha abanyeshuri

eligibleList.label: Ibidukikije n'ingufu
eligibleList.desc: Ingufu zisubirwamo, gucunga imyanda, ubuhinzi buramba

eligibleList.label: Ahoteli n'ibyokurya
eligibleList.desc: Resitora, abategura ibiribwa, aho gutura, ubukerarugendo bw'igihugu

excludedList.label: Ibikorwa by'urugomo
excludedList.desc: Ibikorwa byose by'urugomo cyangwa bitemewe n'amategeko y'Uburundi

excludedList.label: Itabi n'ibiyobyabwenge
excludedList.desc: Gukora, gucuruza cyangwa gukwirakwiza itabi, inzoga cyangwa ibiyobyabwenge

excludedList.label: Intwaro n'ibisasu
excludedList.desc: Ibikorwa bya gisirikare cyangwa ibya gisirikare

cta.title: Ufite ikibazo ku bisabwa ?
cta.description: Itsinda ryacu rihari kugufasha kumenya neza ibisabwa.

phases.description: Gufungura ukwiyandikisha ku rubuga rwa COPA. Gukora konti no kuzuza umwidondoro w’umunyamigambi. Igihe co gutanga amakuru no guhimiriza.
phases.tips: Koresha iki kiringo mu kwegeranya impapuro zawe no gutegura amakuru y’ishirahamwe ryawe.

phases.description: Inyigisho zitegerezwa gukurikiranwa ku rwiyemezamirimo no ku kwandika umugambi w’ubudandaji. Ziraboneka ku kibanza (Bujumbura, Gitega, Ngozi) canke kuri internet.
phases.tips: Kurikirana inyigisho nyinshi bishoboka kugira wongere ubwiza bw’umugambi wawe.

phases.description: Kurungika imigambi y’ubudandaji ku rubuga. Urashobora gutanga umugambi wawe igihe cose muri iki kiringo. Ubutumwa bwo kwemeza buzorungikwa kuri imeyiri no kuri SMS.
phases.tips: Ntuzorindire umunota wa nyuma. Tegura umugambi wawe kare.

phases.description: Gusuzuma imigambi yatanzwe bikorwa n’umugwi w’abahinga bigenga hakoreshejwe urutonde rw’ibipimo bitomoye.
phases.tips: Abasuzuma baraba: ubushobozi bwo kwunguka, udushasha, ico umugambi uzofasha mu kibano no ku bidukikije, hamwe n’ubushobozi bwo kuwushira mu ngiro.

phases.description: Gusohora urutonde rw’abatsinze. Ubutumwa ku giti cawe buzorungikwa kuri imeyiri no kuri SMS. Hazoba n’itangazo rigenewe abanyamakuru.
phases.tips: Iyandikishe ku rutonde rw’ubutumwa kugira umenyeshwe ubwo nyene ivyavuye mu gusuzuma.

phases.description: Kubonana n’abatsinze kugira bashire umukono ku masezerano y’imfashanyo no gusigurirwa uko umugambi uzoshirwa mu ngiro n’ikirangaminsi c’ugusohora amahera.
phases.tips: Amasezerano asigura uko amahera azosohorwa n’ivyo muzoba musabwa gutanga nk’ivyegeranyo.

cta.title: Kwiyandikisha kwuguruwe!
cta.description: Ntucikwe n’incuro ya COPA 2026. Iyandikishe ubu nyene.

success.title: Ikirego cawe cakiriwe
success.message: Urakoze kuduha aya makuru. Dufata buri kirego canke ikibazo n’uburemere bwinshi kandi mu kinyegero.
notifications: Muzoronswa inyishu mu kiringo c’iminsi 15 y’akazi.
Ikirego cawe gikorwa mu kinyegero cose.
Bika inomero ndangakirego kugira ushobore gukurikirana aho kigeze.
success.vbgNotification: 🆘 Ibibazo vya VBG/EAS-HS bihabwa ubwa mbere.

intro.title: Menyesha ikibazo canke ikitagenda neza
intro.description: COPA yiyemeje kwakira no gutorera inyishu ivyiyumviro vyanyu mu kinyegero no mu buryo bubereye. Nimba wabonye ikibazo, ugucurika canke imyifato idakwiriye, ntutebuke kubitumenyesha.

description.placeholder:
Insiguro ido n’ido y’ivyabaye *
Sigura neza ivyabaye, ryari, vyagenze gute hamwe n’abari babirimwo...

files.hint: Impapuro, amafoto, captures d’écran — ntibirenge dosiye 5, 10 Mo imwe imwe

consent.label: Ndemeye ko amakuru yanje afatwa mu kinyegero n’umugwi wa COPA hisunzwe poritike yo gukingira amakuru.

priority.label: Urugero rw’ukwihutisha ugutunganya : {{priority}}
priority.vbgNote: — Ubu bwoko bw’ikirego buzorungikwa ku nzego zidasanzwe zifasha.

profileNote: Mwuzuze neza amakuru yose asabwa. Azokoreshwa mu gusuzuma ubusabe bwanyu mw’ihiganwa COPA.

verifyBanner.title: Suzuma amakuru yawe
verifyBanner.description: Imbere yo kurungika ubusabe bwawe, banza usuzume ko amakuru yose washizemwo ari yo kandi ko impapuro zose zisabwa zashizwe ku rubuga.

statusSection: Ivyerekeye uwuserukira mu mategeko MPME iriko irasaba
identitySection: Indangamuntu y’uhagarariye amategeko wa MPME isaba
eligibilitySectionSubtitle: Wishuye ico kibazo uzoba uhaye uburenganzira abatunganije uwo mugambi kugira amatohoza bibaye nkenegwa
isPublicServantLabel: Woba uri umukozi wa Leta canke uri ku masezerano mu mugambi ufashwe n’abaterankunga b’amakungu ba multilatéraux/bilatéraux?
isRelativeOfPublicServantLabel: Woba uri uwo mwashakanye, umuvyeyi canke umwana w’uwo mukozi wa Leta?
isPublicInternLabel: Woba uri umumenyerezakazi canke umumenyerezabikorwa mu butegetsi bwa Leta ku musi wo kurungika ubusabe bwawe?
isRelativeOfPublicInternLabel: Woba uri uwo mwashakanye, umuvyeyi canke umwana w’uwo mumenyerezakazi?
wasHighOfficerLabel: Woba warigeze kuba Perezida, Umushikiranganji wa mbere, Umushikiranganji canke Umushingamateka mu myaka 5 iheze?
isRelativeOfHighOfficerLabel: Woba uri canke warigeze kuba uwo mwashakanye, umuvyeyi canke umwana w’uwo mutegetsi mukuru?
